topic: Roadmap restructure — terminal goal reframed from formalism-internal metrics to real-world therapeutic destination (16-cell matrix)
verdict_detail: 5 roadmap files (.roadmap.hexa_bio + .roadmap.weave/nanobot/ribozyme/virocapsid) restructured with unified frame: Goal (terminal end-state) / Checkpoints (dated milestones C0~C7) / Require (cross-cutting + per-verb constraints). n=6 invariant lattice explicitly reframed as correctness machinery (not destination). Disease fix at C1: α=AML / β=SCD / γ=pan-coronavirus / δ=senescent-cell clearance (p16-INK4a). POC handoff sequencing: γ-first.

track_a_terminal_goal.previous_framing: σ(6)=12 STRUCTURAL-EXACT 4/4 + Bayesian audit 4/4 + lean4 sorry-free 4/4 (formalism-internal metrics)
track_a_terminal_goal.rejection_reason: User correction 2026-05-05: 'n=6 집착하지 말것 — 실제 암치료 해결수준 등 명확한게 필요'
track_a_terminal_goal.new_framing: 16-cell matrix (4 verb × 4 disease class) all reaching cure-grade — phase I trial entry

track_b_checkpoints.C0b: 4-verb numerical MVP sims (closed 2026-05-05; 4/4 PASS — F-VIROCAPSID-3 / F-RB-4 / F-NB-4 / F-TP5-b)
track_b_checkpoints.C0c: n=30 Bayesian audits (deadline 2026-09-28; F-NB-2 / F-RB-2 OPEN)
track_b_checkpoints.C1: Disease selection (closed in §0' meta — AML / SCD / pan-cov / senolytic)
track_b_checkpoints.C3_through_C7: out-of-repo: wet-lab → in-vitro → in-vivo → IND → phase I

track_c_cross_cutting_require.R5: HEXA + Python bridge pair pattern, raw 9 hexa-only stdlib
track_c_cross_cutting_require.R6: hexa-bio scope = in-silico C0~C2 only; C3+ external

raw_91_c3_disclose: Terminal goal reframe driven by user correction — formalism (n=6 lattice) is correctness machinery, not destination. Goal = real-world therapeutic outcome.
16-cell matrix (4×4) is the in-silico target for C2; current state is 0 cells filled (C2 not started despite v1.1.0 candidate from C0b).
v1.1.0 release = capability infrastructure ready, NOT terminal-goal progress (medical efficacy = 0%).
C3+ explicitly out-of-repo per (R6) scope decision; hexa-bio is in-silico-only repo.

raw_71_falsifiers.condition: any future kick or roadmap update conflates formalism PASS with terminal-goal progress
C2 in-silico 16-cell matrix not started by 2026-09-28
C1 disease selection (AML/SCD/pan-cov/senolytic) revised without §0' update + cycle kick
